heading: Service of notice in Board proceedings
label: 1323 Service of notice in Board proceedings

children.heading: .—Designation of Agent
children.label: a .—Designation of Agent
children.text: A carrier providing transportation subject to the jurisdiction of the Board under subtitle IV shall designate an agent on whom service of notices in a proceeding before, and of actions of, the Board may be made.

children.heading: .—Filing and Changing Designations
children.label: b .—Filing and Changing Designations
children.text: A designation under subsection (a) shall be in writing and filed with the Board. The designation may be changed at any time in the same manner as originally made.

children.heading: .—Service of Notice
children.label: c .—Service of Notice
children.text: Except as otherwise provided, notices of the Board shall be served on its designated agent at the office or usual place of residence of that agent. A notice of action of the Board shall be served immediately on the agent or in another manner provided by law. If that carrier does not have a designated agent, service may be made by posting the notice in the office of the Board.

children.heading: .—Special Rule for Rail Carriers
children.label: d .—Special Rule for Rail Carriers
children.text: In a proceeding involving the lawfulness of classifications, rates, or practices of a rail carrier that has not designated an agent under this section, service of notice of the Board on an attorney in fact for the carrier constitutes service of notice on the carrier.
